name: Marilyn Manson

acts.description: Evan Rachel Wood and multiple other women accused him of rape, torture, psychological abuse, and sexual slavery

behavior_summary: Evan Rachel Wood and at least seven other women filed detailed accusations of rape, sexual torture, and systematic psychological abuse. His record label dropped him; his talent agency and manager severed ties.

art.summary: Shock-rock provocateur who defined 1990s transgressive rock. The persona and the crimes may be harder to separate than most.

verdict.blurb: He built a career on transgression, so it's almost poetic that the worst transgressions were real. When the shock-rock persona and the actual documented abuse become indistinguishable, you have a problem.
